name: Dim 08 — Source of MTAP-loss MIBC prevalence statistic
what_it_solves: Full moat_comparison dimension #8: 'Source of MTAP-loss MIBC prevalence statistic' — Bev2026 approach vs CrisPRO approach with verbatim quote.
how_it_solves: Extracted verbatim from moat_comparison.comparison_dimensions[i]; raw dict carried in attributes.raw.
why_it_exists: Depth pass: previous stream flattened each dimension to a few fields. This entity carries every field the JSON contains for that dimension.

attributes.dimension: Source of MTAP-loss MIBC prevalence statistic
attributes.CrisPRO_approach: Reproduces and cites Bev2026's 26% figure for MTAP/CDKN2A/CDKN2B co-deletion. The 22% figure (CDKN2A-alone in MIBC, Robertson 2017) is also cited as a complementary endpoint when MTAP-status is not specified. CrisPRO has NOT independently reproduced either number — both are taken from external citations.
attributes.moat_status: NEUTRAL — both numbers are Bev2026 + Robertson/Lindskrog original findings. CrisPRO cites them appropriately.
attributes.verification_status: All three verbatim quotes confirmed by direct PDF read 2026-06-24 (pages 2, 12 of PDF). Specific pages cited per quote.

raw.dimension: Source of MTAP-loss MIBC prevalence statistic
raw.Bev2026_approach_verbatim_1: Our analysis of the TCGA MIBC cohort showed that approximately 26% of patients harbor homozygous deletion of CDKN2A/CDKN2B/MTAP, while only a minority (approximately 5%) harbor homozygous deletions of only CDKN2A/2B.
raw.Bev2026_approach_verbatim_2: Co-occurrence of CDKN2A/2B and MTAP deletions interests 26% of TCGA MIBC patients (p value < 0.001 based on...
raw.Bev2026_approach_verbatim_3: Several studies have investigated the molecular landscape of NMIBC and MIBC, revealing that CDKN2A loss at chromosome 9p21 is the most common copy number alteration in BLCA, occurring in approximately 42 and 22% of NMIBC and MIBC, respectively13,14.
raw.CrisPRO_approach: Reproduces and cites Bev2026's 26% figure for MTAP/CDKN2A/CDKN2B co-deletion. The 22% figure (CDKN2A-alone in MIBC, Robertson 2017) is also cited as a complementary endpoint when MTAP-status is not specified. CrisPRO has NOT independently reproduced either number — both are taken from external citations.
raw.moat_status: NEUTRAL — both numbers are Bev2026 + Robertson/Lindskrog original findings. CrisPRO cites them appropriately.
raw.attribution_clarity: Important: 26% (Bev2026 = MTAP+CDKN2A/B co-deletion) ≠ 22% (Robertson 2017 = CDKN2A loss alone, MTAP status not specified). Conflating them would be a methodological error.
raw.verification_status: All three verbatim quotes confirmed by direct PDF read 2026-06-24 (pages 2, 12 of PDF). Specific pages cited per quote.

verbatim_evidence.note: verbatim quote from Bev2026 PDF as recorded at file creation time
